notes: Latest first. Author is always 'Waystar Learning'. Date is ISO YYYY-MM-DD; the page renders it as 'May 11, 2026'. body is two short English paragraphs, separated by a blank line (\n\n). No em dash (U+2014) or en dash (U+2013) anywhere in title or body. The formula AI agents must follow when adding a new entry lives in /AGENTS.md under the announcements-protocol section.

entries.author: Waystar Learning
entries.title: The Genius! Editor just got a lot deeper
entries.body:
Yesterday we expanded the Genius! Editor in a big way. The brainstorming side grew from 28 to 39 prompts, with new questions covering sensory grain, cultural fingerprint, inherited language, contradictions, and formative scenes.

The writing side also gained more prose templates (6 to 14, with 34 build variants), a voice palette built from the student's own phrases, a motif map of repeated words, opening suggestions that adapt to the story's shape, an 'angle you might be avoiding' card, and a discard pile that quietly fades the angles already picked. Each card now has a like, dismiss, and refresh loop, and one button refreshes the whole board at once.
